name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax provides car title pledge loans and flex lines of credit using vehicle equity, with same-day funding and approval for most credit types including poor credit.
description_long:
TitleMax is a title loan company with storefronts across multiple states. The Memphis Summer Avenue location has been serving the greater Memphis area since February 2007, making it one of the longer-standing alternative lending options in the region. TitleMax operates both physical stores and an online platform, giving borrowers flexibility in how they apply and manage their loans.

TitleMax offers three primary products at this location. The title pledge loan is a secured short-term loan where the borrower uses a clear vehicle title as collateral in exchange for a lump sum of cash — the borrower retains use of the vehicle during repayment. The flex line of credit is also secured by the vehicle title but functions like a revolving credit line, letting customers draw funds as needed up to their approved limit rather than taking a single lump sum. TitleMax also offers an unsecured flexible line of credit, available both in-store and online, which requires only a valid government-issued ID, a recent bank account statement, and proof of income. The online version is restricted to residents of eleven states: AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, and WI.

TitleMax's primary differentiator is its lending criteria: rather than qualifying borrowers solely on credit score, it weighs the market value of the vehicle and the borrower's ability to repay. This opens approval to many applicants with poor or damaged credit histories. Bilingual service is available at the Summer Avenue location, and with over 481 Google reviews averaging 5.00 out of 5, staff responsiveness and professionalism are frequently cited by customers. The flex line of credit structure provides ongoing emergency access without requiring a new application each time funds are needed.

Title loans are among the most expensive forms of consumer credit. While TitleMax advertises 'competitive rates,' the company does not disclose specific APRs on its store page, and title loans across the industry routinely carry triple-digit annual percentage rates. More critically, the secured structure means a borrower who misses payments risks vehicle repossession. The unsecured line of credit removes the collateral risk but may carry equally high rates. Borrowers should request the full APR, fee schedule, and repayment terms in writing before signing. TitleMax is best treated as a last-resort option when lower-cost alternatives — credit union PALs, employer advances, nonprofit counseling — have already been exhausted.
address: 210 W University Dr Suite A, McKinney, TX 75069

company_info.headquarters: 210 W University Dr Suite A, McKinney, TX 75069

pros: Same-day cash disbursement available on the day of approval
Vehicle equity considered alongside credit score, so most credit types accepted
Borrowers keep driving their vehicle throughout the title loan repayment period
Flex line of credit allows drawing funds as needed rather than one fixed lump sum
Unsecured line of credit option available for those who do not want to pledge their vehicle
Bilingual staff available at the Summer Avenue Memphis location
5.00/5 average rating from 481+ Google reviews at this location, with multiple staff members cited by name
cons: Vehicle repossession risk if title loan payments are missed
APR and fee details are not disclosed on the store page — must be requested in person before signing
Online unsecured line of credit is limited to 11 states and not available nationally
Clear vehicle title required for title loans — borrowers who still owe on their car may not qualify
Store is closed on Sundays, limiting same-day emergency access on weekends
best_for: Car owners with a fully paid-off, clear vehicle title who need cash the same day
Borrowers with poor or damaged credit who cannot qualify for bank loans or credit union products
Tennessee residents who want a revolving flex line of credit for recurring emergency expenses
Borrowers in the 11 eligible states seeking an unsecured line of credit with a fast application process
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for car owners with a clear vehicle title who need same-day emergency cash and have poor credit with no viable lower-cost alternatives. The central caveat is cost and collateral risk: title loans typically carry very high APRs that are not disclosed upfront, and defaulting means losing your vehicle. Treat this as a last resort and confirm the full APR and repayment schedule in writing before committing.
services: Car title pledge loans (secured, lump sum)
Flex line of credit secured by vehicle title
Unsecured flexible line of credit (online, 11 states)
Vehicle value assessment for loan qualification
Customer loan management portal (title loans and personal loans tracked separately)
